data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 88,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.95% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 26, 2026, 06:45 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 88,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 88,001.867188 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.95% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Binance Futures to Update XAUUSDT Perpetual Contract Price Index
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform will implement changes to the price index components of the USDⓈ-Margined XAUUSDT Perpetual Contract. This update is scheduled to take effect on 2026-01-29 at 08:00 (UTC). The adjustments aim to optimize the trading experience for users by refining the composition of the price index.

The revised price index will see changes in the weightage of its components. The PAXGUSDT component from Binance will maintain its weightage at 1%. However, significant adjustments will be made to the other components. The Dxfeed XAU/USD:AFX component will see an increase in its weightage from 9% to 33%. Similarly, the weightage for both MassiveC.XAU/USD and PythXAU will be adjusted from 45% to 33% each. These changes reflect Binance's ongoing efforts to enhance the accuracy and reliability of its price indices.

This update is released under Binance Exchange Rule 17, and users are encouraged to visit the Price Index page for the latest information on price index components. API users can access the updated data through the endpoint: /fapi/v1/constituents. The adjustments are part of Binance's commitment to providing a robust trading environment, ensuring that users have access to precise and up-to-date market data. The announcement underscores Binance's dedication to continuously reviewing and improving its product offerings to meet the needs of its global user base.

data.title: Key Considerations for Using Clawdbot in the Crypto Industry
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) about important precautions for using Clawdbot in the crypto industry. The post highlighted eight critical points to ensure safe usage. Firstly, it advised against exposing the Gateway to the public internet, emphasizing the need to restrict access sources to avoid direct IP exposure. Secondly, it stressed that private keys or mnemonic phrases should never interact with the Agent, even for 'read-only tasks.' Additionally, the post recommended applying the principle of least privilege to API keys, whether for exchanges or data sources, to minimize potential risks.

data.title: A newly created address withdrew 1,500 BTC from Binance, worth $131 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 11 minutes ago, a newly created address (bc1qkr) withdrew 1,500 BTC from Binance, worth $131 million.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Key Resistance Levels Amid Market Uncertainty
data.description: Crypto KOL 币特进 (@roger73005305) posted on X, discussing the current resistance levels for Bitcoin. According to the post, Bitcoin is encountering significant resistance at two key positions: 87,972 and 90,428. These levels are crucial barriers that Bitcoin has struggled to surpass recently. The post suggests that if Bitcoin fails to break through these resistance points, it may present opportunities for short selling, with a recommendation to include stop-loss measures. The analysis highlights the ongoing challenges in the cryptocurrency market, emphasizing the importance of strategic trading decisions in light of current market conditions.

data.title: ETH More Likely to Hit $2,000 Than Reclaim $4,000: Analyst

Ethereum faces higher downside risk toward $2,000 than a breakout above $4,000, according to Mike McGlone.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/eth-more-likely-to-hit-2000-than-reclaim-4000-analyst/

data.title: Solana Sees Significant Stablecoin Inflow as Ethereum Supply Declines
data.description: Solana has experienced the largest stablecoin inflow over the past seven days, with an increase of $1.3 billion. According to ChainCatcher, during the same period, Ethereum's supply saw a reduction of $3.4 billion.

data.title: Consensys Urges FTC to Prioritize Neutral Security Measures in Nomad Case
data.description: Consensys, the parent company of MetaMask, has called on the U.S. Federal Trade Commission (FTC) to prioritize technology-neutral security measures in the Nomad case. According to Foresight News, Consensys expressed concerns that the proposed mandate might inadvertently hinder transparency in security practices. The FTC has requested the mandatory adoption of features like 'circuit breakers,' mechanisms designed to halt operations during suspicious activities. Consensys argues that such compulsory regulations could overlook the unique architecture of decentralized systems.

data.title: Gate Square's revamped content incentive mechanism is now in public beta, with creators eligible for up to 60% commission rebates.
data.description: According to official news, Gate Square recently completed an upgrade to its "content mining" mechanism and simultaneously launched a public beta test for its "Revitalized Season." The upgrade focuses on optimizing content incentives and transaction rebate pathways, driving the conversion of content value into actual revenue. During the public beta, creators who publish qualified content on Gate Square and guide users to complete real transactions in spot, futures, or Alpha trading can participate in fee rebate sharing, with individual creators potentially receiving up to 60% of the fees. In terms of revenue structure, all eligible creators receive a 10% basic rebate guarantee. The platform also introduces an interaction incentive mechanism, offering additional rebates upon achieving posting or interaction targets. Furthermore, Gate Square will rank creators weekly based on post count and interaction performance, providing extra rewards to the top 100 creators. Double rebates are also offered to new and returning creators during the public beta. Gate stated that it will continue to optimize content incentives and transaction conversion mechanisms to encourage more creators to cultivate a long-term presence on Gate Square, jointly building a more vibrant and sustainable content and trading ecosystem.

data.title: Da Hongfei: Plans to resolve Neo's investment in Binance and realize its value within two years.
data.description: Da Hongfei stated in an article on the X platform that Zhang Zhengwen did not disclose the discussions between the two parties regarding the Binance investment. Neo invested in Binance in 2017 and has not received any dividends or BNB distributions to date. However, this investment remains a significant financial asset for NF and NGD, belonging to the community and cannot be managed in a dictatorial manner. One of its goals is to resolve and realize the value of this investment within the next two years, using the funds for the Neo ecosystem. Da Hongfei pointed out that Zhang Zhengwen's current agenda, including smearing his character, threatening his personal safety, and attempting a hostile takeover, is pushing Neo to a dangerous extreme and jeopardizing Neo's assets themselves. Da Hongfei called on Zhang Zhengwen to stop fighting for personal control and a dictatorial agenda and to add functionality to the Neo mainnet as a core developer.

data.title: Solana saw $1.3 billion in stablecoin inflows and $3.4 billion in Ethereum outflows over the past 7 days.
data.description: Artemis data shows that Solana saw the largest inflow of stablecoins over the past 7 days, increasing by $1.3 billion, while Ethereum's supply decreased by $3.4 billion. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: ETH Predicted to Surpass BTC in Quantum Security
data.description: Framework Ventures co-founder Vance Spencer shared on the X platform that if current conditions persist, Ethereum (ETH) will emerge as the sole quantum-secure cryptocurrency. According to Odaily, Spencer anticipates that ETH could surpass Bitcoin (BTC) within one to two years.

data.title: Ethereum Faces Uncertain Market Conditions Amid Weak Sentiment
data.description: CyrilXBT posted on X. Ethereum is experiencing renewed interest despite facing challenging market conditions characterized by unattractive price movements and weak sentiment. However, there is no indication of panic selling among investors. Maintaining current price levels is crucial to avoid further market instability. CyrilXBT expressed a willingness to purchase more Ethereum if prices decline further, indicating a personal strategy to capitalize on potential lower valuations.

data.title: NEO Co-Founder Calls for Leadership Change Amid Disagreements
data.description: Zhang Zhengwen, co-founder of NEO, has expressed dissatisfaction following a recent meeting with Dahongfei, citing a lack of concrete proposals on critical issues. According to NS3.AI, Zhang outlined three minimum conditions for improvement: the implementation of verifiable financial management, the abandonment of the competing EON project, and authorization to control official NEO communications. Dahongfei rejected all these requests, prompting Zhang to call for his resignation due to concerns over NEO's decline under his leadership.

data.title: Crypto Whale Faces Significant Losses Amid Market Downturn
data.description: A major cryptocurrency investor has incurred substantial losses following recent market fluctuations. According to PANews, the investor, known for purchasing $263 million worth of WBTC and ETH through leveraged loans, sold 400 WBTC for 34.67 million USDT after Bitcoin's price fell to $86,000.The investor's strategy of buying high and selling low has resulted in a total loss of $51.17 million. Specifically, the investor bought 18,517 ETH at $4,415 each, totaling $81.75 million, and later sold them at an average price of $3,049, resulting in a $25.29 million loss. Additionally, the investor purchased 1,560 WBTC at $116,762 each, totaling $182 million, and sold 960 WBTC at an average price of $89,798, leading to a $25.88 million loss.

data.title: Whale Engages in High-Leverage Short Trading Strategy
data.description: On January 26, a whale executed a short trade using 40x leverage on 22.5 BTC, with an average entry price of $87,771.1, currently experiencing a slight unrealized loss. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the address employs a high-leverage short-term trading strategy, primarily focusing on BTC, with a recent inclination towards bearish positions.

data.title: Framework Ventures co-founder: If the status quo continues, ETH will surpass BTC within 1 to 2 years.
data.description: Vance Spencer, co-founder of Framework Ventures, wrote on the X platform that if the status quo continues, ETH will become the only crypto asset with quantum security and will surpass BTC within 1 to 2 years.

data.title: UK Financial Authority Nears Completion of Crypto Regulation Consultations
data.description:
The United Kingdom's Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) is approaching the final stages of its consultation process for significant proposed cryptocurrency regulations, as it continues to develop the government's crypto roadmap. According to Cointelegraph, the FCA announced on Friday that it is now seeking feedback on ten regulatory proposals, marking the "final step" in its consultations on potential rules for the sector.

The FCA emphasized that these proposals aim to foster an open, sustainable, and competitive crypto market that people can trust. However, the agency acknowledged that risks remain and expressed a desire for a market where innovation can thrive, while ensuring that individuals understand the associated risks. The FCA clarified that regulation should not attempt to eliminate all risks, but rather help investors comprehend them.

The proposed regulations encompass various aspects of the crypto market, including business standards of conduct, credit-based crypto purchases, regulatory reporting, asset safeguarding, and retail collateral treatment for borrowing crypto, among other areas. The deadline for feedback on these proposals is set for March 12. Initially outlined in December, the FCA's package of proposals reflects its intent to regulate the crypto market in a manner similar to traditional finance.

The FCA has reported "significant progress" in refining the regulatory details as part of the government's roadmap. Earlier this month, the agency announced a timeline for crypto asset service providers to register under its new licensing regime. The FCA expects the application period to commence in September 2026, with the timeline to be confirmed in due course. This licensing regime will impose stricter oversight and constraints on crypto firms, requiring them to obtain FCA authorization to operate within the UK.

data.title: Da Hongfei Responds to Zhang Zhengwen's Statements on Neo Foundation
data.description:
Da Hongfei has publicly responded to recent statements made by Zhang Zhengwen, describing them as a "serious distortion of facts" and accusing Zhang of presenting "only part of the truth." According to Odaily, Da Hongfei is still seeking "limited cooperation" with Zhang.

Da Hongfei clarified that the "mechanism" Zhang proposed was essentially a centralized management model similar to the Neo Foundation's treasury, requiring his approval for every transaction and expenditure. In contrast, Da Hongfei suggested that starting this year, the Neo Foundation and NGD would disclose their financial reports quarterly to enhance transparency and detail.

He further explained that he had informed Zhang and other community members about the possibility of publishing news and blog content on neo.org and had offered the use of the @Neo_Blockchain account to expand their influence. However, this background information was not fully disclosed, leading to a presentation of "partial facts." Da Hongfei emphasized the need to document all communication thoroughly in the future.

Regarding financial arrangements, Da Hongfei revealed that with Zhang's consent, NGD has conducted a transaction with the Neo Foundation treasury, initially amounting to $1 million, executed at spot prices. The aim is to increase NGD's equity share to align stakeholder interests and provide Zhang with operational funds for promoting the Neo mainnet.

Da Hongfei reiterated his stance on "limited cooperation," advocating for collaboration where goals align and independent progress where differences exist. He believes this is the only viable path to resolving Neo's governance stalemate and revitalizing its ecosystem. He urged Zhang not to misinterpret his statements further.
